title: Eliminate `&&` nil-punning with pattern-matched function heads
prompt: Given: `def maybe_email(user), do: user && user.email`. Replace with two function heads: `def maybe_email(nil)` returning `nil`, and `def maybe_email(%{email: email})` returning `email`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Contact do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Single-direction swap from `&&` nil-punning to pattern match.
research_citation: georgeguimaraes elixir-thinking: 'Avoid value && value.field nil-punning—obscures actual return types'
